name: sk-prompt
description: Prompt engineering parent hub: routes to prompt-improve (7-framework, DEPTH-thinking, CLEAR-scored prompt enhancement) and prompt-models (read-only small-model prompt-craft profiles for DeepSeek-v4-pro, Kimi-k2.7-code, MiniMax-M3, MiMo-V2.5-Pro, GLM-5.2) through mode-registry.json and hub-router.json. The advisor sees one hub identity; workflowMode selects the packet.
trigger_examples: which framework should I use for this prompt
what's the recommended prompt scaffold for DeepSeek-v4-pro
help me write a better prompt
